name: Newton-Raphson root finding
task: Create /tmp/eval_nr/nr.py with newton_raphson(f, df, x0, tol=1e-10, max_iter=100). f is the function, df is its derivative. Iterate x ← x - f(x)/df(x). Stop when |f(x)| < tol and return the converged x. Raise ValueError if df(x) == 0 at any iterate or max_iter is exceeded without convergence.

validation.script:
import importlib.util,math; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_nr/nr.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); NR = mod.newton_raphson; assert abs(NR(lambda x:x*x-2, lambda x:2*x, 1.0) - math.sqrt(2)) < 1e-9; assert abs(NR(lambda x:x**3-27, lambda x:3*x*x, 2.0) - 3) < 1e-9
try: NR(lambda x:x*x+1, lambda x:2*x, 0.0)
except ValueError: pass
else: raise AssertionError
print('OK')
